name: form
description: v-next server-first Form: a native <form> wrapper that owns a form-level error summary region (always in DOM for aria-live pre-registration) and stacks its field children. v-next adds: errors list (List<Map<String,String>> with fieldId+message for anchor links), errorSummaryHeading, focusOnError (data-lv-autofocus for enhancer focus management), layout (stacked/inline/grid), size + labelWidth propagated via CSS custom properties (--lv-form-size, --lv-form-label-width), autocomplete/enctype/novalidate/ariaLabel/headingId HTML controls, and a footer slot. Back-compat preserved: single-String error path, data-slot=form-error slot name, id/${errorId} derivation, aria-describedby conditional wiring, method/action/cssClass params. Pairs with the field partial for per-field wiring.
docs: Copies the form partial to your JTE root at lievit/form.jte, reached as @template.lievit.form(id=..., action=..., errors=formErrors, content=@`...`). v-next: pass `errors` (List<Map<String,String>> with fieldId+message keys) for an anchored error summary; set focusOnError=true to have a JS enhancer auto-focus the summary after failed submit. Size and labelWidth propagate via --lv-form-size / --lv-form-label-width CSS vars. Back-compat: old callers using `error` (single string) continue to work unchanged. The source is yours: edit freely.
